content.text: A big release! Meet our new mascot, a brand-new plugin & theme repository, and a whole lot more. Here's everything that's new in 1.6.0.

items: Meet **Aurora**, our new mascot and logo — created by Amelia in Procreate!
There is now an integrated **Repository** for plugins and themes, letting you browse and install them directly from within the client.
With the new **Headliner** feature, you can change the titlebar of AviaClient to anything you like.
You can now fully **backup and restore** AviaClient's data — themes, plugins, QuickCSS, and more.
You can now **log in with a session token**.
A new **About window** has been added, accessible via the tray or by pressing `F1`.
**Monaco** is now the default editor for Plugins, Local Plugins, Themes, and QuickCSS.
Many quality-of-life improvements under the hood for developers.
The desktop app has been **rebranded** to AviaClient throughout.
Local plugins can now be imported directly from a `.js` file.
Themes can now be imported from a `.txt` or `.css` file — including via drag-and-drop.
The Settings UI now correctly identifies itself as AviaClient.
You can now display the custom titlebar with the **system's native window buttons** (close, minimize, maximize).
The tray icon menu now includes a **Restart App** option.
There's a new option to **disable the show/hide behaviour** of the tray icon when clicking it.
Plugin installation now supports **Codeberg** in addition to GitHub URLs.
DevTools can now be opened by pressing `F12`.
A method to get the AviaClient version via JS has been exposed: `window.native.versions.aviaClient()`.
AviaClient's version is now displayed in the tray alongside Stoat's version.
**Discord RPC** now displays AviaClient.
**macOS:** The default about window now uses AviaClient's version as the buildId.
**macOS:** Settings can now be opened and closed with `Cmd + ,`.
Fixed chatbar buttons being placed incorrectly under certain circumstances (thanks 0simp#2291!).
Fixed a rare race condition during app initialization.
Fixed app badges being unable to display — badge logic still pending.
